deviations.what: the controller's openDatePicker calls byId('HiddenDP').openBy(oEvent.getSource().getDomRef()) - openBy is NOT in the CONTROL_METHODS whitelist (source-verified in abap2UI5 app/webapp/core/FrontendAction.js, 2026-07-19), so the sample's central interaction is not executable today: the port keeps the 1:1 wiring (press -> backend event carrying the anchor id via $event.oSource.sId, then follow_up_action control_by_id HiddenDP//openBy/<anchorId>), but the frontend rejects the unlisted method with a logged error and the date picker does not open; consequently the change handler's toast (Date selected: ...) cannot fire either. Needs a pr/ request extending CONTROL_METHODS with openBy (an arg kind resolving a control id to its DOM ref) - flagged to the batch coordinator, not filed here because this batch generation writes only the three port files.
Button.ariaHasPopup (since UI5 1.84) is newer than 1.71 but kept for the 1:1 port on both Buttons - the app needs a UI5 release >= 1.84 to render it.
Link.ariaHasPopup (since UI5 1.86) is newer than 1.71 but kept for the 1:1 port - the app needs a UI5 release >= 1.86 to render it.
DatePicker.hideInput (since UI5 1.97) is newer than 1.71 but kept for the 1:1 port - the app needs a UI5 release >= 1.97 to render it (the matching openBy method is since 1.97 too).
